title: Vanilla Tea
description: A simple "vanilla minus" modpack that leans into Minecraft's sandbox elements.
body:
Vanilla Tea is a vanilla minus modpack that turns Minecraft back into a sandbox game that encourages building and creativity. Hundreds of changes have been made to recipes, building blocks, loot, and more to provide a smooth and cohesive experience.

**No End, No Villages —** The End and Villages have been removed. Other parts of the game have been reworked with great care in order to fill the gaps they left behind, making gameplay feel more cohesive than before.
![Ancient Box placed in a Bastion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1d8d38c72524eaa377899f2b01f6171739bffb1.png)

**Hundreds of Recipe Tweaks —** Acquiring resources to build with is now easier than ever before. New recipes for materials like copper, concrete, dyes, bricks, etc. allow more room for creativity than in Vanilla.
![Alternate recipe for Green Dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28eb1ae44a77ecf973ded62abb6ad2943498e353.png)
![Edited recipe for trapdoors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccc56234b3f61968422129a204d4a363b293c658.png)

**Texture Changes —** No more ugly wood colors! Acacia, Jungle, Crimson, and Warped wood types have been given a fresh coat of paint to make them more versatile in building. Similarly, Dark Oak, Jungle, Crimson and Warped wood types have been renamed to Mahogany, Kapok, Wartwood, and Warpedwood respectively.
![Kapok, Acacia, Wartwood, and Warpedwood next to each other](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d5d826c8af1f6f1b6d5bb73dedd9524a7022420.png)


**Debloating —** Gone are the days of glistering melons and phantom membranes. Many items with only one use have been removed, and their functions have been relegated to other items. Some parts of world generation has also been changed to keep blocks like Copper and Granite abundant, but out of your way.
![A chunk of Nether Copper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a19f9e2f86ea0cfec6cb4c689d4b7d6434f888f5.png)
![Andesite generating in the new Basalt Caves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab5138cec198d04b9a7f2fa6ebfecbfd9c8d4eee.png)

Special thanks to Pickeles for drawing the logo, and to Raspmary and Kelpiesaurus for inspiration. Check out their modpacks Raspberry Flavored and Gentle Brew!

Similar thanks to my friends Asof and Ivqry for encouragement.
